description: You are a Clinical Data Manager for the Phase II Diabetes Trial (DM-TRIAL-2024). A Pharmacokinetics (PK) analysis team has requested a dataset correlating patient demographics with vital signs, excluding Adverse Events (AE) or Concomitant Medications. Log in to OpenClinica (root / Admin123!) and create a dataset named 'Safety_PK_Analysis' for the Phase II Diabetes Trial. Include 'Date of Birth' (or DOB) and 'Gender' from the Demographics CRF, and 'Systolic BP', 'Diastolic BP', and 'Heart Rate' from the Vital Signs CRF. Ensure no items from Adverse Events or Concomitant Medications are included. Export the dataset in Tab-Delimited Text format to /home/ga/Downloads.
